creator: seschwar@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 204906
clojure-1.10.1.diff

Clojure 1.10.1 was released recently:

- announcement: https://clojure.org/news/2019/06/06/clojure1-10-1
- changelog: https://github.com/clojure/clojure/blob/master/changes.md#changes-to-clojure-in-version-1101

It's a minor version bump.  The attached diff updates the port accordingly.  It builds cleanly in poudriere under FreeBSD:12:amd64.
